records.name: Damian Mottram
records.comment: Roper Lawyers and Olivier is one of these scenarios where you can take a look at the website and think 'can it really in practise all be as good as this?'. Well, in our experience it is and was. We purchased (in Gran Canaria) from start to finish in around 5 weeks from offer acceptance and Olivier was extremely helpful, communicative, efficient. With good thoughts and ideas and a pleasure to work with. Available and back to queries on a daily or next day basis; sometimes during the day or for emails in to the evening and working behind the scenes to get things sorted and other parties moved along. Keeping things simple and thorough on the detail and dealing with queries promptly and clearly. In an ideal world, how working with a lawyer/ solicitor should be but often isn't. 'Exceptional' would be a very fair word and the same with his support personnel for during and post purchase support. Thoroughly recommend and great to have such a good, clear website to peruse too and take information from.

records.name: Elena Jfremova
records.comment: I had an excellent experience with Roper Lawyers and would highly recommend them. The solicitor who supported us was extremely responsive, professional, ethical, and thorough throughout the whole process. The level of communication was outstanding - every question was answered quickly, and we always felt well-informed and supported. They provided practical guidance, clear legal advice, and helpful support at every stage. Their high standards, attention to detail, and hands-on approach made a real difference. A trustworthy and reliable firm that I would not hesitate to recommend to anyone needing legal support. Thank you again for all your help and hard work.

records.name: Phil Norman
records.comment: We have used Ropers Lawyers to sell 2 properties and buy one during the last 3 years. Each time the service has been excellent. Rachel went above and beyond to keep us informed of progress and dealt with issues quickly and efficiently. Great communication and local knowledge. Highly recommend Ropers Lawyers.

records.name: Neil Marston
records.comment: A very good service provided by Rachel and the team in our recent property purchase. Supportive and knowledgeable throughout the end to end process ensured a good and timely outcome. Would recommend.

records.name: Jeff Roberts
records.comment: The legal side of my apartment sale in Puerto del Carmen was handled by Roper Lawyers and I must emphasise what excellent service I received from them. I must single out Rachel for special praise as she was a constant support from beginning to end and in particular her patience and promptness in dealing with my many questions re my capital gains tax liability. Would thoroughly recommend Roper Lawyers

records.name: Mark Robson
records.comment: Roper Lawyers managed the entire process requiring very little input on our part, and zero stress. As soon as we signed power of attorney (highly recommended) Rachel and Olivier did everything for us. Excellent service!

records.name: Tim Rowson
records.comment: Very pleased with the service in submitting our Annual N2 Rental Filing.

records.name: Jean-Luc De Geeter
records.comment: A professional and efficient team! Excellent communication.

records.name: jane fahy
records.comment: I found Roper Lawyers extremely easy to deal with very professional in all cases. I have no hesitation in highly recommending them Jane Fahy

records.name: Raymond Hayes
records.comment: Very easy dealing with Roper Lawyers, who were very prompt in sorting out my legal requirements. Would recommend them to others. Ray Hayes.

records.name: Lee-Ann Sanderson
records.comment: Ropers Lawyers assisted us with both the sale of our existing property and the purchase of our new home in Lanzarote on the same day — which is more complex than a standard transaction. Our case also involved closing a mortgage with Abanca, which proved extremely difficult due to the lack of a local branch and ongoing delays in issuing the required certificates. Rachel, the legal assistant handling our file, was truly outstanding throughout the entire process. She worked incredibly hard to coordinate the simultaneous sale and purchase, dealt persistently with the bank despite repeated obstacles, and invested a huge amount of time ensuring everything could proceed. Her communication was excellent — always prompt, clear, and reassuring — even outside normal working hours when necessary. She explained each step, answered our many questions with patience, and kept things moving forward under significant pressure. Rachel also helped with multiple additional tasks including utility transfers, mortgage closure, bank account closure, and coordination with the buyer’s legal team to protect our agreed moving date. Her professionalism and dedication genuinely reduced our stress during what could have been a very difficult process. Our direct contact with the assigned lawyer was very limited, so we are not really in a position to comment on his role specifically. However, based on our experience, Rachel herself delivered exceptional service and we are very grateful for her efforts.

records.name: Sharon Stead
records.comment: It has been a pleasure using Roper lawyers in regard to the sale of our property. Rachel was very professional and knowledgeable in every way possible helping us through the process of selling our property. Thank you Rachel . Would highly recommend Roper Lawyers an excellent team to work with.

records.name: Mateja Hari
records.comment: I must emphatically praise Ms. Rachel from the Roper Lewers Agency! I urgently needed legal advice regarding property in Lanzarote, and she immediately responded to my request without any hesitation, demonstrating utmost professionalism and deep expertise in the field. Rachel is incredibly prompt, reliable, and highly responsive, possessing a vast wealth of knowledge concerning both real estate and complex legal matters in the region. She is truly exceptional in her field. I strongly and wholeheartedly recommend her for any advice, guidance, or information you might need. She is a shining star and a true expert whose input is invaluable. Given that I live in Slovenia, I need professional help even more. Rachel, along with her team, helps guide the entire legal transaction, from the sale to the purchase of a property and vice-versa. Without her support, I would not dare to buy a property in Lanzarote. Mateja Slovenia

records.name: Sean Walsh
records.comment: We would like to thank Roper Lawyers for all their help in purchasing our wonderful property. From start to finish the whole experience was very straight forward and stress free. We would especially like to thank Rachel, who went out of her way to help us in every way possible. We would highly recommend Ropers when purchasing a property in Lanzarote.

records.name: Donna Loudon
records.comment: Thanks to Rachel for organising my NRA reference number. Very professional and quick service. Rachel even took the time to call me directly in the UK regarding my licence. Would recommend Ropers Lawyers. Thanks again for your help. Donna Loudon

records.name: Chris Trayner
records.comment: I found Roper Lawyers very helpful. I had an urgent problem that I couldn't solve myself and they solved it in 24 hours. They were courteous, professional and pleasant to do business with.

records.name: Patsy Tagg
records.comment: Re Roper Lawers I have found them very helpful in every thing especially in paper work and advice I would recommend them highly nothing is too much trouble for them Patsy Tagg

records.name: Xtro 7
records.comment: 1. I will start by telling that without Olivier and his team, the purchase of the property it would not have been possible. It was only possible due to the professionalism and exemplary work that Olivier and his team demonstrated. 2. In addition to everything, Olivier also offered me psychological support in the most difficult moments. 3. Laura the legal assistant was with me at every step of the transaction process, explaining every detail and answering all my questions. 4. This team through their exemplary work made our dream (to have an apartment in Tenerife) come true, mentioning that it was a more special case in terms of difficulty, a fact that did not stop them from going til the end with the process of helping us buying the property. We thank you from the bottom of our hearts.

records.name: Heather Ramsay
records.comment: Could not recommend Roper Lawyers enough. From start to finish the service was excellent. I dealt mostly with Laura who was just lovely and really on the ball with everything. A really friendly approachable team, answered any queries quickly and in detail. Was selling my property in Lanzarote which can obviously be stressful but any worries I had were dealt with a reassuring message. Had complete confidence throughout the process. Have sold a few properties over the years in the UK but can honestly say this was the best experience I have had. Just really nice people doing a fantastic job. Thank you Olivier, Laura and Alexi

records.name: Nick Hammond
records.comment: i recently sold a property in Lanzarote, Roper Lawyers, Oliviah and Alexi, dealt with this for me and their sevice is second to none, i highly reccomens

records.name: Brian Mackay
records.comment: Both Olivier Roper and Alexi, who handled my purchase, were first class and processed the entire transaction without issue, I would have no hesitation in recommending their services.

records.name: willie Morgan
records.comment: I would highly recommend Roper Lawyers. The Team are Excellent, especially Laura who was very professional and very efficient and most of all so helpful to me throughout my conveyancing process. From start to finish Laura could not have been more helpful. She guided me through the process giving me excellent advise and made the process so flawless and took away completely the stress and worry for me. I knew I was completely in safe hands from the start and I cannot recommend Roper Lawyers and Laura enough. Nothing was too much trouble. So if you are looking for an excellent and very professional super efficient lawyer firm in Lanzarote, look no further than Roper Lawyers. Many thanks again Laura for all your help. William M.

records.name: D W
records.comment: Very helpful from start to finish! Alexi and the team helped us through the process, unusually we never met any of the team as we did this 100% remotely by granting power of attorney, which I would definitely recommend, as it makes things so much easier for everyone! The Roper team are very knowledgable and super supportive, so all I can say, is Thank You!

records.name: Steven Elbourne
records.comment: Well what can I say about Roper Lawyers. They have provided an excellent service from start to finish. Nothing to much trouble, they return your emails and calls extremely fast, virtually instantaneously. I’m a Yorkshire man so very cautious with my money and was very nervous about buying abroad but the service, I’ve had a second to none and they’ve made the buying process so less complicated. Than I thought it was going to be. Always there to help and advise. All I can say is a massive big thank you to the team at Roper’s. A special shout out to Alexi who has been fantastic and such a pleasure to deal with and meet. Such a professional ! ⭐ 5 star service ⭐ 10 out of 10 Thanks Steven & Debbie

records.name: Guy Fitzpatrick
records.comment: Olivier and his team provided expert and timely support throughout each step of the buying process. In what turned out to be a complicated and lengthy purchase, we are extremely grateful to have had Olivier and Laura by our side to guide us. They went above and beyond to support us and look after our best interests, and I highly recommend working with them.

records.name: Eric & Cecilia Johnson
records.comment: Olivier Roper and Laura give me outstanding help and advice there experience and wisdom could not be any better and about all there patients as I had a difficult sale, could not have asked for anyone better. Eric Johnson

records.name: Andy Kaye
records.comment: Superb service!

records.name: Maria Lopez
records.comment: When I contacted Olivier, I was in the middle of a complicated sale. I was the buyer of a property using private capital from an investor based in UK. But some difficulties came along the way with the owner and her solicitor, on the top of dealing with the bureaucracy of both countries that made the whole operation really a challenge. However, Olivier and his colleague Laura were always keeping me updated, dealing with all the issues very professionally and always looking out for my best interest. I´m very grateful with both, but I would like to make a special mention to Laura, not only for the great job she has done, but also for keeping me going even though I was tempted to pull out the deal several times due to all the complications with the purchase of the property. Olivier and Laura, I can't thank you enough for all your support and kindness. Therefore, I would highly recommend you to anyone, no doubt! :-) x

records.name: JJ MALLIAGH
records.comment: I have to say the attention to detail, that we received at "Team Roper" was second to none! From Mr. Roper who showed us around the property to Olivier, The Lawyer and the team of Alexi, Laura, Chris and Isabelle. They kept us informed throughout the negoations to buy. A very professional team, who led from the front! We can certainly recommend them to take care of the purchase of your property !! James and Patricia (Ireland)

records.name: Billy Greene
records.comment: Very happy with Roper Lawyers for the Purchase of our Apartment in Puerto Del Carmen, Lanzarote. Professional, approachable, accessible and very good with advice. I would recommend Roper Lawyers

records.name: Warrick McDowell
records.comment: We had absolutely no hiccups during the entire house purchasing process, from finding a property, validating its status, working with our mortgage brokers and our banks, representing us using power of attorney to sign the documents on our behalf, and putting utilities in our name. We were able to seamlessly communicate in English and Spanish, which was a big plus. I would recommend Roper Lawyers to any and everyone looking to find a good property.

records.name: Jose Vitoria
records.comment: I received an excellent service whilst purchasing a second home in Fuerteventura. Olivier and Laura, from Roper Lawyers, were very supportive throught the whole process of purchasing a property in Fuerteventura, which has not been an easy task. The continuous chasing of the vendor with the help of Laura resulted in a successful purchase of my dream property in Fuerteventura. The communication was continuous, thanks to their advice and support I did not give in and I am now enjoying my property. I felt supported throughout at every step of the process.

records.name: Eduardo Freitas
records.comment: We hired another lawyer and gave that person a Power of Attorney for a purchase of a house. We were advised by our lawyer to sign the arras (earnest money contract) and give a 10% deposit, only to find out one week before signing the deed that the property was full of debts and encumbrances dating back from 2010 (unpaid local council taxes), which we would “inherit” by purchasing the property. We’ve had a nightmare scenario with stress and anxiety due to this horrible late news. Looking for a second opinion we spoke with many people and by sheer luck we ran into Olivier and explained the situation. He provided the best feedback ever and spent at least one hour with us on the phone to guide us, all out of pure good will, care, and professionalism. Olivier is incredible and we wish we would have found him ages ago. Way to go Olivier. You know how to make customers happy and above all, you respect people and value them. You are a role model for every lawyer and have raised the bar very high! Thank you so much.

records.name: slatts 2006
records.comment: Having tried to manage the transaction ourselves we engaged Roper. What a relief and positive experience! From ensuring the legal documentation was complete, liaising with the Notario to representing us at the signing they were very diligent and professional. We can also say that they very efficiently took care of all the handover items (i.e. Utilities) with the property and ensured that we were referred to tax agent etc. We highly recommend them!

records.name: Loredana Laera
records.comment: We feel very lucky to have appointed Olivier and Alexi at Roper Lawyers. They were so supportive and professional whilst we tried to purchase a house in Tenerife. The service and advice we received was fundamental for us to make the right decision. Roper lawyers are highly trained and skilled and very attentive while dealing with foreign clients like us, so I would recommend them very highly!

records.name: Gary Paul Walby
records.comment: Superb from start to finish I had Never dealt with a foreign property sale before but smooth is the only word needed

records.name: Richard Nelms
records.comment: Excellent service throughout our first new home purchase in Playa Blanca. Alexi addressed all our needs in English and was very willing to support our naive enquiries. We delegated power of attorney to Olivier and he was also willing to explain things and offer specific advise on costs and our expectations - all in perfect English. With these guys you have a competitive offering and real peace of mind. Thanks again Alexi and Olivier, we will have no hesitation in using you again in the future 👍👍

records.name: Em
records.comment: Amazing! Olivier’s team are great. My personal representative Laura Salona literally held my hand through every step of the purchasing process. Thank you Laura!

records.name: t c
records.comment: Great support, very experienced and clear, pragmatic advice

records.name: TIM BAKER
records.comment: Alexi is an absolute STAR. Prompt reply to all emails, extremely efficient and certainly the best Solicitor I have dealt with in Spain. We will be using Alexi for any/all of the legal matters we need to deal with.

records.name: Damian V
records.comment: From once we were referred to Roper Lawyers, our experience has been one of extreme satisfaction. Olivier explained the whole process, elements and timings of purchasing in Lanzarote. From once we identified a property, the attention to detail, follow through and communication by him and his colleague Alexi made the process very manageable. When we ran into challenges with the selling Vendor (an unusual occurrence by all accounts), Roper Lawyers were there to provide immediate and worthwhile guidance and direction. Although the purchase transaction failed to materialise, we were nevertheless protected, helped and more than reasonably supported by Olivier and Alexi. Overall I found Roper Lawyers to be ethical, professional and diligent in all our dealings and will definitely engage their services again.

records.name: K S
records.comment: I found that this firm provided me with a highly efficient, professional and approachable service. They were prompt, helpful and thorough in assisting me with relevant information. Their excellent English language skills certainly helped with effective communication.

records.name: kielitaito mirakel
records.comment: We have just purchased an apartment in Tenerife and we would not have been able to do so without guidance of Oliver, Alexi&team. They are super professional,skilled, helpful, supporting and ever so patient. They always took time to answer all million questions:-) The process of buying a property in spain is so different if you compare the process in Finland so you need someone who holds your hand, makes the process smooth and stress free. Upon on that also the team took care of insurances, water and electricity agreements etc. We can highly recommend their service and a special Thanks to Alexi, who has been so efficient and supporting. You are the best! Kind regards., Heini & Petri from Finland

records.name: Jonathan Heaume
records.comment: I had a super service from Olivier Roper - efficient, friendly and he gave me just the level of assistance I was after. Thank you.

records.name: Eve
records.comment: We used Ropers as our solicitors in porta del carmen To buy a property they've been fantastic especially Laura she kept us informed all the way through and . Every question we asked she sorted out. We have them power of etorney. Which made it so easy. All we need to do now is make a will with them. Thank you Laura nothing has been to much trouble for you. Thank you again so much Yvonne, Mark.

records.name: Mark Campbell
records.comment: Roper Lawyers provided excellent legal advice and service throughout the purchase of our apartment. Right from the initial call with Olivier, through the many interim steps carried out carefully and diligently by Alexi, to accompanying us to the Notary to finalise the signing, the team worked in a proactive and responsive way. They communicated regularly and clearly, and helped us overcome the problems and challenges that inevitably arise in any property transaction, particularly when buying overseas. With the benefit of their legal and administrative knowledge and experience the entire process was efficient and effective. We highly recommend using Roper Lawyers.

records.name: Shirley Aspinwall
records.comment: To Ropers Lawyers @ their team . We wanted to express our satisfaction and gratefulness for all the services provided by Ropers Lawyers in Puerto del Carmen. We can’t recommend them highly enough, not only for their professionalism, efficiency, reliability, but also their understanding, patient and friendly attitude and constant support and reassurance. Nothing is too much trouble. Above all one can totally trust them to take over, act on your behalf and rest assured that there will be no problems. We had been advised to write a Legal document expressing our wishes to be cremated over here, and not sent back to the UK , at considerable cost to the family. Rather like a ‘Living Will ‘ . We went to Ropers , met Laura, the Legal Representative. She’s a lovely person, cheerful, bright, enthusiastic and very knowledgeable Vi. She sent me an Email outlining the procedure and questions. Then booked an Appointment at the Hospital in Arrecife to meet Celsa , the charming young translator. After 2 interesting hours there, all our concerns and questions were answered. No pressure of time at all, and all documentation handed to us before we left. A very relaxing, friendly environment efficiently organised. Laura did over and above the call of duty and offered to drive us there and back from Arrecife, as we were OAP’s with no transport. Very thoughtful of her, much appreciated. We are extremely satisfied with every aspect of Ropers services. So, if anyone is seeking Legal advice, then loo

records.name: Mieke Van den Bergh
records.comment: 1000% satisfied with the help and service Roper Lawyers provided us with the purchase of our house in Lanzarote. Highly recommended if you are looking for a reliable agency. Thanks again Olivier, Alexi and the other team members.

records.name: olga fleming
records.comment: Highly recommend Roper Lawyers what a fantastic team Alexie and Laura made the whole process very easy very professional and friendly Every email and question was answered and explained Thank you so much Olga fleming.

records.name: Anthony Joyce
records.comment: I have worked in the building industry for 25 year and built upwards of 3000 homes for KB homes out of Ca. So I have worked with many banks and estate agents, the complete professional attitude here is exceptional their language translation makes everything seem normal. Thank you Anthony

records.name: Judith Neuner (Julia Menke)
records.comment: We had an exellent experience with Roper Lawyers and we fully recommend them. Olivier and Alexi did a great job helping us to get out of trouble when we had a legal dispute with another agency that deceived us. Roper Lawyers represented us legally and helped us to get out of a contract and saved us from loosing a lot of money which would have ruined us. With Roper Lawyers you'll have honest and fair legal representation. We cannot recommend them enough! We'ld give more than 5 stars if possible! Second review: Olivier Roper and his team helped us a second time when we finally found the house of our dreams in Lanzarote. Alexi and Laura from the Roper Lawyers Team checked all documents very carefully. At the notary Laura made sure that everything was documented the correct way and I really felt I could fully trust her.The Roper team works very thoroughly and is quick-witted when it comes to customer concerns. They will definetly defend the customer's interest the very best. At the same time, everyone was incredibly friendly towards us customers. Without the help of Roper Lawyers we would have made a lot of mistakes in the buying process and once more we highly recommend the service. With Roper Lawyers you are in the very best hands!!

records.name: Vicki Longbottom
records.comment: Roper Lawyers have been great helping us navigate the purchase process and the subsequent transfer of all utilities e.t.c. They are super quick responding to any queries we had, often replying in a few hours to our emails. We got Power of Attorney so they could complete on our behalf, we just provided the information they needed, arranged the POA to be legalised in the UK (had to google a bit to find a local solicitors who provide this). We literally then just had to collect the keys! The team, especially Alexi we’re all fab and I would recommend them if you need a lawyer to respresent you with buying a home in Lanzarote.

records.name: Bea Van Moorsel
records.comment: A very good experience with this lawyer and firm. We bought a villa in Puerto del Carmen and all the paperwork was handled correctly within two months. We were kept very well informed throughout the whole process and were advised on everything we needed to do to be in order. Highly recommended!

records.name: John Maloney
records.comment: Ropers Lawyers have been exemplary throughout the whole of the conveyancing process. Alexi has been totally professional and helpful; He fully understood that we were new to the Spanish property purchase system and was always available to answer our questions. I wouldn't hesitate to recommend Ropers to anyone needing professional advice with their house purchase.

records.name: Paul Greene
records.comment: Roper Lawyers were incredibly professional and made our property purchase effortless. I have no hesitation in recomending the whole team to anybody making a purchase. Brilliant service.

records.name: Bill Brassington
records.comment: Would just like to go on record to say what outstanding professional service I received from Roper lawyers in Lanzarote. Living in tenerife, I decided to purchase a bungalow and come and live in lanzarote. However breaking a hip made it impossible for me to travel to complete all the necessary paperwork. That said Roper lawyers went way beyond normal solicitor duties to assist me throughout my purchase. I can now look forward to lanzarote in the very near future. I have absolutely no hesitation in recommending Roper lawyers to everyone. THANK YOU AGAIN OLIVIER. Bill Brassington

records.name: William Henderson
records.comment: For the best quality service available in in Lanzarote no pain or strain job done thanks.Bill

records.name: Nick Sedgwick
records.comment: Roper Lawyers made the purchase of our property extremely easy. We gave them Power of Attorney enabling them to obtain our NIE numbers, open a bank account on our behalf, and transfer utilities and community charges over to us. Alexi in particular was very helpful. We wouldn’t hesitate to use them again and would thoroughly recommend them to others.

records.name: James Lynch
records.comment: I had some property issues that Olivier promptly and thoroughly helped me with. I am very grateful and highly recommend.

records.name: John Mcgee
records.comment: A big thank you to Olivier and Alexi for navigating us through the purchasing process for our very own "home in the sun" in Tenerife. Living in the UK and not speaking Spainish the prospect of transferring a significant sum of money abroad can be daunting. You took the hassle out of the process by dealing with all aspects, including obtaining our NIE's which meant we were able to kick back and enjoy our new home - thanks for an excellent service.

records.name: Jackie Platt
records.comment: Nice people, and very helpful and professional.

records.name: Lisa Rogan
records.comment: The dream of a life time came in may when we bought our place in the sun . I’d like to thank Olivier Roper for all the help explaining and answering all our questions.

records.name: Alan Murphy
records.comment: We used Roper Lawyers to obtain our NIE and then to act on our behalf when we purchased our house in June 2022. We were delighted with the excellent service. They made the whole process very easy and they were very efficient from start to finish. From initially giving us a clear breakdown of all costs and fees we would be paying as part of the house purchase right through to completion of the purchase and final handover off all the documentation with receipts of all expenses. We would strongly recommend then to anyone intending to purchase property in Lanzarote.

records.name: Jill Hawthorne
records.comment: We would highly recommend Roper Lawyers as conveyancing solicitors. The team was responsive, helpful and efficient throughout our recent property purchase, fielding many questions for us along the way. Our thanks are due to Laura, Alexi and Olivier for all their professionalism.

records.name: Philippa Mclean
records.comment: I spoke to Oliver, he was kind considerate and very helpful. After selling a property in Lanzarote I lost a lot if money and paid a fortune in Tax and fees. His advice was very helpful.

records.name: Cathy Thacker
records.comment: We Can highly recommend 100%, the whole team were very professional from start to finish. We were updated regularly by staff what was happening, nothing was too much trouble all questions were answered promptly . Fabulous team, friendly & attentive. Many thanks for making our purchase journey smooth and safe. Catherine and Steven Thacker

records.name: Kerry Burr
records.comment: Roper Lawyers were thorough, helpful and easy to liaise with during our recent property purchase. Not speaking the language was not an issue as they speak good English and arrange impartial interpreters when required. The property purchase was completed within 6 weeks, and each step of the process was explained along the way. I would not estate to use Roper Lawyers in the future.

records.name: Joris
records.comment: I bought a house in fuerteventura Corralejo with there assistance. It can be quite stressful to buy a house in the canaries because you're not familiar with the country, it's laws and language. Also when it comes down to the payment of the house and costs since this is different to how we do that in our country. Roper Lawyers speak good english, comforted me with the sometimes silly questions I had and assisted my well.

records.name: yvonne Blackburn
records.comment: Helped us buy 2 Properties on the Island, knowledgeable and efficient, more than helpful. Would happily recommend to anyone and potentially use again

records.name: Kirsty Brown
records.comment: Very helpful, pleasant to speak too. Gave him a load of questions which all got answered. Would use the service again if needed.

records.name: Katherine F
records.comment: Fab company.. cannot recommend Alexi and team highly enough.From start to finish they are there for you and such a reputable company it's no wonder Kevin is so trusted and respected on the island.Have no hesitation in recommending him.xxx

records.name: Gary Cobbing
records.comment: We cannot reccommend Roper Lawyers highly enough, they made the process incredibly smooth and explained the rules and regulations very clearly. made purchaisng a property very easy. their English is first class too.

records.name: Gerard kierans
records.comment: Excellent and efficient service and responsiveness from Olivier and Alexi. Would have no hesitation in recommending Roper Lawyers for all your legal conveyancing requirements in Lanzarote.

records.name: Mcfly
records.comment: Myself and my partner purchased a property in puerto del carmen and wanted to use a local lawyer who specialises in property- After some research we chose Roper lawyers and were glad we did- A very pleasant hassle free purchase with all of our utilities and Spanish bank account set up for us by ropers whilst we were in the U.K- All we had to do was pick up the key to our place in the sun! A Big Thankyou to Olivier and Alexi at Ropers lawyers for a professional service.

records.name: Ali Elliott
records.comment: Olivier and Alexi at Roper Lawyers are absolutely fabulous, we purchased a house in Gran Canaria (so not just limited to Lanzarote) and the service we received was second to none, it was efficient, knowledgeable, and very reasonably priced, we are using them as our Spanish Lawyers from now on and can not recommend them highly enough!

records.name: Louis Farrell
records.comment: Firstly I am reviewing as a family of 4 who have just made our first move out of the uk and to Lanzarote. Olivier , Alexi and the team at roper lawyers genuinely made this possible for us. without their information, advice and guidance through the process we wouldn't have been able to make our dream move. I can say without doubt that if we hadn't used their services we would have spent thousands more after making mistake after mistake. from the military permission required to purchase our home that we were unaware of, to translating documents and accompanying us to the notary and also assisting us in navigating issues that presented themselves along the way they made the move as stress free as I imagine it could be. I would certainly recommend them to family friends and the like. Definitely the right choice.

records.name: Marek Wietlicki
records.comment: Top legal service from Roper Lawyers. I would highly recommend them for professional help. As first time buyer of house in Spain, without knowlegde of Spanish language and local rules, it seemed very stressful to me and my wife to navigate through usually complexed process of negotiations, agreement, purchase and property transafer. Oliver and Alexi made these tasks easier than expected and made us feel more comfortable with every next step. I have a lot of experience with lawyers in Poland, where I live and work, and was quite surprised receiving an e-mail response from Alexi within single minutes. Oliver perfectly adviced me in core matters especially by negotiations of purchase agreements. It is worth to admit we negotiated another property first until, as result of strange seller requirements, we had to quit before we turned to buy our second choice in Fuertaventura. But after receiving final bill we were again positively surprised not to find surcharge for missed transaction. Thank you Oliver and Alexi, for sure we will come back anytime we like to buy/sell property in Spain.

records.name: Andrew S
records.comment: A pleasure to do business with. We came across Roper Lawyers after the experience we were having with our now previous lawyer (taking too long to respond to email requests, not appearing too bothered about doing the work for us) caused us to look around.... We were buying a property on the island, and due to the travel restrictions in the UK, and the ever changing guidelines of CV-19, we needed a firm that could do all of the 'heavy lifting' for us, appreciating that things were going to be pretty fluid, due to our inability to be on the island to conclude business. Olivier and Alexi were (and still are!) superb - nothing was too much trouble, ever. Olivier even gave us his personal whatsapp number, and would call and leave voice messages on a regular basis, with updates and options in terms of getting things done. Alexi even facilitated 'key access' to various contractors, to allow for quotes for works to be done, whilst we were unable to get to the island to do it ourselves. The contract signing process was easy - as it is all done by Docusign, and the transfer of utilities/community of owners/registration at town hall etc, were all done with ease and with updates at every step of the way. This is the third property that I have bought on the island and I wish I had found Roper Lawyers before - I cannot recommend them highly enough and would definitely use them again, without any hesitation. Olivier and Alexi made was is normally a very stressful process as easy as it could

records.name: Michelle Holton
records.comment: Really friendly and very helpful, I would definitely recommend Roper Lawyers to anyone purchasing a property. Would absolutely use them again in the future.

records.name: David Malone
records.comment: Excellent experience with Roper Lawyers. Purchasing a property in a foreign country can be an intimidating experience but Olivier and his team made it so easy with everything taken care of from the legalities involved in the purchase, NIE number, bank account, utility bill transfer, insurance, tax payment etc. I would highly recommend Roper Lawyers.

records.name: tony O Driscoll
records.comment: I recently purchased a property in lanzarote PDC old town and i decided to choose roper lawyers because they have extensive experience with dealing with property! Roper lawyers are highly trained and skilled and very attentive while dealing with clients, i was a client from overseas and to say the interaction and just the whole experience was less stressful than i originally thought! So in my experience Roper Lawyers are the real.deal when it comes to finalising a properly closure in speedy time and not once was there an issue. I would Highly recommend this company to anyone. Kind regards tony from Ireland.

records.name: Gill Hough
records.comment: Olivier and his team have just guided and supported us through the legal process of our first ever purchase abroad. The process was completely new to us and they were so patient and responsive to all our questions and nothing was ever too much trouble. They provide a first class service from start to finish and I honestly can’t recommend them enough. Thank you Olivier and Alexi for making the process completely stress free and so much easier. Gill Hough and Ken Gardner

records.name: Fiona Taylor
records.comment: Fantastic experience, brilliant professional lawyer. I cannot praise Olivier Roper and his team enough. I found Olivier via google and whilst a little apprehensive about selecting a lawyer this way the website reviews were reassuringly accurate. From the start to finish of our Lanzarote apartment purchase he has supported us all the way. Providing us with good contacts in the UK to facilitate a power of attorney and navigation of the foreign and commonwealth office for an apostille. Organising the notary, bill transfers and other tax requirements. Great, frequent communication and help, via whats app and email. Very reasonable fees, great value for money. Nothing has been too much trouble and his advice and knowledge to steer us through the purchase of the apartment has been first class. Highly recommended, cannot praise him highly enough. You are in very safe, capable hands! Thank you Olivier, you are a ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

records.name: Billy Murray
records.comment: Very profesional eficient service.Would recommend to anyone.

records.name: Richard Burkmar
records.comment: Excellent Service, helped us purchase our property from start to finish. A totally professional team that provided support and expertise to ensure that all requirements were fully managed. Would definitely use again and recommend to others.

records.name: Paul Hurst
records.comment: First class service from start to finish. Olivier is very friendly and professional and did everything he could to help us out with anything that we asked him. Would definitely recommend him if you want a hassle fee process.

records.name: K A
records.comment: Excellent service from start to finish. Olivier and his staff were meticulous in their dealings helped enormously by being fluent in English and Spanish. Highly recommended
